pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21 to enable compilation for the new JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project will compile against Java 17 bytecode, failing to utilize Java 21 features and potentially causing runtime incompatibilities if Java 21-specific APIs are used in the code.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Lombok dependency to version 1.18.46 to ensure compatibility with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of Lombok may fail to compile or process annotations correctly on Java 21 due to internal API changes or lack of support for new language features.
